name: Dual Toxocyst
description: Brain-strikes excite this bioweapon, causing it to rapidly release toxic munitions.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Brain-strikes excite this bioweapon, causing it to rapidly release toxic munitions.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Mutagen Mass
components.description:
This living mass can produce weaponized toxins for weaponry.

Location: Clan Research (Bio Lab in the Dojo) and Infested Outbreak Invasion Rewards

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes:
Changed condition from ‘Headshot’ to ‘On Hit’ for Dual Toxocysts in Conclave.
Reduced buff duration of Dual Toxocysts from 6 to 3 seconds in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.6
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Dual Toxocyst getting ‘excited’ from Sentinel headshots.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.2
patchlogs.changes: •    Reduced the Dual Toxocyst’s ‘excited’ fire rate from 500% to the intended 150% in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Dual Toxocyst getting ‘excited’ from elemental status effects as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/622296-dual-toxocyst-gets-excited-buff-on-gas-blast-and-electricity-procs/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Adjusted the audio FX on the Dual Toxocyst.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Adjusted the audio FX of the Hyekka Master, Kavat and Dual Toxocyst.
